programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #2
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh, Simon and Ray cook three simple but tasty dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Hawkes Bay
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants travel to Hawkes Bay for an invention test using spring lamb and fresh local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #3
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Cake
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants make a hamburger cake and a milkshake for baking maestro Mathew Metcalfe

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #4
programme.desc: Guest chef Mathew Metcalfe joins Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie to make three delectable desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Young Guns
programme.desc: The top seven contestants cook fine dining dishes for three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #5
programme.desc: Guest chef Nick Honeyman cooks three very different examples of modern New Zealand cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Huka Lodge
programme.desc: The top six contestants cook a course each from the gourmet dinner menu at iconic Huka Lodge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #6
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws from Huka Lodge joins Josh Emett and Simon Gault to cook three hearty meat dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Dessert
programme.desc: The top five contestants must replicate a challenging dessert created by award-winning chef, Michael Meredith.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #7
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook their favourite desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Business Class
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants cook Business Class in-flight meals for Jetstar.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #8
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three different cuts of beef.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Singapore
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants face two epic challenges in the culinary capital of Asia, Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #9
programme.desc: Street food master K.F. Seetoh and Eric Bost, join Ray McVinnie for a Masterclass in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The three semi-finalists try to impress cookbook queen Annabel Langbein.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #10
programme.desc: In the last Masterclass of the Season, the judge give us a taster of their signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Final
programme.desc: The final two contestants take on four challenges in their bid to become New Zealand's next MasterChef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Top 50 - Audition Dish
programme.desc: 50 contestants arrive and cook their best Audition Dish for the Judges in the hope of earning an apron.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Part 1: Invention Test & Part 2: George's Pressure Test
programme.desc: Just 10 aprons remain for the 18 remaining aspiring home cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box - Past Champions Inspiring Future Champions
programme.desc: The top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for the very first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Kylie Kwong Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: 21 contestants face elimination for the first time with a three-round challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box and Invention Tests
programme.desc: The 21 contestants enter the kitchen to find a mystery box at their bench.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test Elimination with Guest Chef Shannon Bennett
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Team Challenge: Upstairs Downstairs Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants split into two teams for a lunch service challenge at two popular St Kilda restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: How Far Will Your Fish Go?
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge are all facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box - Maggie Beer
programme.desc: The queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer, returns to the kitchen for the Mystery Box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: Alla Wolf Tasker Pressure Test
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the Invention Test face off in the Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Two Part Challenge - Part 1: Mini Mystery Box
programme.desc: The three best performing contestants in the Invention Test get to compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Two Part Challenge - Part 2: Mirror The Menu
programme.desc: In this challenge it's all about strategy, memory, communication, pace and teamwork.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge – Diminishing Pantry
programme.desc: The losing team from the latest challenge now face off over three rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Part 1: Staffies Mystery Box & Part 2: Remove Proteins or Fruits and Vegetables
programme.desc: A mystery box challenge quickly becomes a nightmare for some.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test Elimination – Christy Tania’s Mango Alfonso
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Chin Chin Immunity
programme.desc: The contestant playing for immunity must cook off against Benjamin Cooper from leading restaurant, Chin Chin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Team Dessert Degustation
programme.desc: The contestants are tasked to create a four-course dessert menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Gumbo Elimination
programme.desc: The contestants from the losing team compete in a blind taste test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Power Pick Invention Test
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Season 06

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - St Crispin Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants must recreate a dish made by the co-head chefs from Melbourne restaurant Saint Crispin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Immunity Challenge: Matt Stone
programme.desc: With immunity up for grabs. the three contestants battle it out with cheese.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Team Challenge: Queen Victoria Market
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at Melbourne's Queen Victoria Market and work in teams at four different stalls.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The losing team from the off-site challenge will compete in a time-auction elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Invention Test: Chocolate
programme.desc: In the invention test, each team has to produce one sweet and one savoury dish using chocolate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test: Nobu Matsuhisa
programme.desc: In a pressure test like no other, internationally acclaimed chef Nobu Matsuhisa sets a challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test are vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Offsite Challenge: Wedding Anniversary at Ascot House
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at Melbourne to celebrate a diamond jubilee wedding anniversary with no food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the off-site challenge go head-to-head to keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box: Marco Pierre White
programme.desc: The contestants are stunned to find the Godfather of modern cooking, Marco Pierre White, waiting for them.

programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal is a game show where contestants play and deal for a top cash prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Five Dollar Redemption
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal history collides on stage when Artis Jackson gets the chance to redeem his family’s honor.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Beard Or No Beard
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Happy Howie Days
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back after 10 years with a heart-warming holiday special.
